name: libdigest-crc-perl
title: libdigest-crc-perl
summary: Perl module providing generic CRC functions
description:
Perl module providing generic CRC functions
The Digest::CRC module calculates CRC sums of all sorts.
It contains wrapper functions with the correct parameters for CRC-CCITT,
CRC-16, CRC-32 and CRC-64. The module acts similar to libstring-crc32-perl,
but implements the Digest interface.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdigest-crc-perl because Perl module providing generic CRC functions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdigest-crc-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdigest-crc-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdigest-crc-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
